# Tom Wahl's
> Rochester's favorite burger destination since 1955. Home of the Wahlburger®, Rochester's best cheeseburger, ground steak burgers, homemade root beer & the 55 Junker Plate. Located in Western New York.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://mmcke4.github.io/): Tom Wahl's — Rochester's Best Cheeseburgers since 1955
- [Order Online](https://mmcke4.github.io/order-online.html): Order for dine-in, pickup or delivery from all locations
- [Locations](https://mmcke4.github.io/locations.html): All 7 Rochester-area locations with hours and directions
- [Rewards Program](https://mmcke4.github.io/rewards.html): Earn 2 points per $1; free cheeseburger after first $10 purchase
- [Coupons & Deals](https://mmcke4.github.io/coupons.html): Current promotions and discount codes
- [Gift Cards](https://mmcke4.github.io/gift-cards.html): Physical and eGift cards
- [Careers](https://mmcke4.github.io/careers.html): Now hiring at all locations
- [Host a Fundraiser](https://mmcke4.github.io/fundraiser.html): 15% of sales donated to your organization

## Menu
- Full menu: https://www.orderexperience.net/62602331214add22d5341ca5/menu
- Signature: Wahlburger (Ground Steak Burger + Ham, Lettuce and Signature Sauce on a 5" seeded roll)
- Classic: Rochester's Best Cheeseburger
- Fan favorite: Kid's Meals, 55 Junker Plate
- Drink: Homemade Root Beer (made on-site)
- Also: Kid's Meals, Crispy Fries, Hot Dogs, Fish Dinners, Chicken Tenders, Ice Cream

## Locations (open 11AM–9PM daily)
- Avon: 283 E Main St, Avon, NY 14414 — (585) 226-2420
- Brighton: 2545 Monroe Ave, Rochester, NY 14618 — (585) 441-9620
- Bushnell's Basin: 643 Pittsford-Victor Rd, Pittsford, NY 14534 — (585) 586-4920
- Canandaigua: 2510 Rochester Rd, Canandaigua, NY 14424 — (585) 393-9170
- Fairport: 1333 Fairport Rd, Fairport, NY 14450 — (585) 377-8420
- Greece: 671 Maiden Ln, Rochester, NY 14616 — (585) 504-7470
- Newark: 585 W Union St, Newark, NY 14513 — (315) 331-9112

## Contact
- Phone: 585-787-0150
- Email: feedback@tomwahls.com
- Rewards/Points inquiries: rewards@tomwahls.com
